data.body:
## Description

**What**: Implement the git clone install path for the Jekyll USWDS template, which does not use nava-platform.
**Why**: Jekyll USWDS has no copier.yml and cannot be installed via nava-platform. A direct git clone is the appropriate mechanism.
**Scope**:
- IN: Clone template repo via git clone with full HTTPS URL from registry. Pre-flight check for non-empty directory — warn user and offer abort or proceed. Check exit codes. Surface clear errors on clone failure. Handle captive portal / auth wall redirects (verify cloned content is not HTML).
- OUT: nava-platform install path (story 7769-814e). Post-install flow (story da98-0163).

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, the Jekyll USWDS template is installed into the project directory via git clone using the HTTPS URL from the registry
  ← Satisfies: "Jekyll USWDS: git clone with exit code checks"
- When this story is complete, if the target directory is non-empty, onboarding warns the user and offers to abort or proceed before cloning
  ← Satisfies: "git clone with non-empty dir warning/abort"
- When this story is complete, clone failure (non-zero exit code) surfaces a clear error message with manual fallback
  ← Satisfies: "clear error on failure"
- Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Reliability] git clone into non-empty directory fails with exit 128 — must pre-check.
- [Reliability] Captive portal redirects may cause git to download HTML instead of repo content — consider post-clone validation.
- [Security] Install target restricted to CWD or subdirectory.
